## IdentifierResultsGetters.identifierResultsRequest property

The adapter request object for retrieving the identifier suggestions, or null if there is not valid data to create a request.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
identifierResultsRequest: SearchByIdRequest | null;
```
